title: Replace generated logo with uploaded official DMTI logo

requirements.summary: Replace current placeholder logo in Navbar and Footer with the official DMTI logo served from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded logo image (dmti-logo.png) is present in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The Navbar component displays the uploaded logo in place of any previous logo or text-only brand mark
The Footer component displays the uploaded logo in its brand column in place of any previous logo
The logo renders at an appropriate size (e.g., height ~40–48px in Navbar, ~56–64px in Footer) with preserved aspect ratio
No broken image links or placeholder logos remain on the page

file_operations.description: Replace the current logo implementation with an element that references the uploaded official DMTI logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png. Set an appropriate height (e.g., h-10 or h-12 for ~40-48px) and preserve aspect ratio using w-auto. Ensure the logo remains visible and properly aligned within the navbar layout.

Replace the current logo in the brand column with an element that references the uploaded official DMTI logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png. Set an appropriate height (e.g., h-14 or h-16 for ~56-64px) and preserve aspect ratio using w-auto. Ensure the logo is properly positioned at the top of the brand column.
